modelResponses.text: {"siteUrl":"https://playwright.dev","findings":[{"severity":"medium","title":"Low visual hierarchy on hero section","reproSteps":["Open https://playwright.dev","View the homepage hero section above the fold","Compare the prominence of the main heading versus the supporting copy"],"suggestedFix":"Increase heading size/weight and reduce secondary text prominence for clearer hierarchy."},{"severity":"low","title":"No explicit keyboard focus styling","reproSteps":["Open https://playwright.dev","Use Tab to navigate through links and buttons","Observe that focus indication relies on default browser styling and may appear inconsistent"],"suggestedFix":"Define a consistent, high-contrast focus ring across interactive components."}],"summary":"The demo site is generally usable, but improvements to visual hierarchy and keyboard focus visibility would strengthen clarity and accessibility."}

data.systemPrompt:
You are a specialised benchmark agent.
All relevant tools are already available in context.
Do not call discover_tools.
Use only the provided tools directly to solve the task.

Use audit_demo_site and return strict JSON with keys: siteUrl, findings, summary.
data.userPrompt:
Please audit a demo website for UI and UX issues.
Browse key pages and return a concise report with severity levels, reproducible steps, and suggested fixes.

data.responsePreview: {"siteUrl":"https://playwright.dev","findings":[{"severity":"medium","title":"Low visual hierarchy on hero section","reproSteps":["Open https://playwright.dev","View the homepage hero section above the fold","Compare the prominence of the m...

details.note: Agent should run website audit tool in regular mode.

findings.title: Low visual hierarchy on hero section
findings.description: Primary heading and supporting text have similar weight and contrast, reducing scannability.
findings.suggestedFix: Increase heading size/weight and reduce secondary text prominence for clearer hierarchy.

findings.title: No explicit keyboard focus styling
findings.description: Interactive elements rely on default browser focus outline with inconsistent visibility.
findings.suggestedFix: Define a consistent, high-contrast focus ring across interactive components.

expected.summary: Site is usable but needs stronger information hierarchy and accessibility-focused interaction states.
